name: Numeric
summary: A number of methods have been added to the Ruby Numeric class to do units conversions.

methods.name: cm
methods.summary: The cm method is used to convert from centimeters to inches.
methods.remarks: The cm method is used to convert from centimeters to inches.

returns.doc: a value in inches if successful

methods.name: degrees
methods.summary: The degrees method is used to convert from degrees to radians.
methods.remarks: The degrees method is used to convert from degrees to radians. For example 90.degrees would return 1.5707963267949

returns.doc: a value in radians if successful

methods.name: feet
methods.summary: The feet method is used to convert from feet to inches.
methods.remarks: The feet method is used to convert from feet to inches.

returns.doc: a value in inches if successful

methods.name: inch
methods.summary: The to_l is used to convert from a number to a length.
methods.remarks: The to_l is used to convert from a number to a length.

methods.name: km
methods.summary: The km method is used to convert from kilometers to inches.
methods.remarks: The km method is used to convert from kilometers to inches.

returns.doc: a value in inches if successful

methods.name: m
methods.summary: The m method is used to convert from meters to inches.
methods.remarks: The m method is used to convert from meters to inches.

returns.doc: a value in inches if successful

methods.name: mile
methods.summary: The mile method is used to convert from miles to inches.
methods.remarks: The mile method is used to convert from miles to inches.

returns.doc: a value in inches if successful

methods.name: mm
methods.summary: The mm method is used to convert from millimeters to inches.
methods.remarks: The mm method is used to convert from millimeters to inches. It returns a Length value which is the same length as the given value. For example len = 25.4.mm returns 1 inch.

returns.doc: a value in millimeters if successful

methods.name: radians
methods.summary: The radians method is used to convert from radians to degrees.
methods.remarks: The radians method is used to convert from radians to degrees. For example, 1.5707963267949.radians would return 90.0

returns.doc: a value in degrees if successful

methods.name: to_cm
methods.summary: The to_cm method is used to convert from inches to centimeters.
methods.remarks: The to_cm method is used to convert from inches to centimeters.

returns.doc: a value in centimeters if successful

methods.name: to_feet
methods.summary: The to_feet method is used to convert from inches to feet.
methods.remarks: The to_feet method is used to convert from inches to feet.

returns.doc: a value in feet if successful

methods.name: to_inch
methods.summary: The to_inch method converts from inches to inches.
methods.remarks: The to_inch method converts from inches to inches. This does not change the value.

returns.doc: a value in inches if successful

methods.name: to_km
methods.summary: The to_km method is used to convert from inches to kilometers.
methods.remarks: The to_km method is used to convert from inches to kilometers.

returns.doc: a value in kilometers if successful

methods.name: to_l
methods.summary: The to_l is used to convert from a number to a length.
methods.remarks: The to_l is used to convert from a number to a length.

methods.name: to_m
methods.summary: The to_m method is used to convert from inches to meters.
methods.remarks: The to_m method is used to convert from inches to meters.

returns.doc: a value in meters if successful

methods.name: to_mile
methods.summary: The to_mile method is used to convert from inches to miles.
methods.remarks: The to_mile method is used to convert from inches to miles.

returns.doc: a value in miles if successful

methods.name: to_mm
methods.summary: The to_mm method is used to convert from inches to millimeters.
methods.remarks: The to_mm method is used to convert from inches to millimeters.

returns.doc: a value in millimeters if successful

methods.name: to_yard
methods.summary: The to_yard method is used to convert from inches to yards.
methods.remarks: The to_yard method is used to convert from inches to yards.

returns.doc: a value in yards if successful

methods.name: yard
methods.summary: The yard method is used to convert from yards to inches.
methods.remarks: The yard method is used to convert from yards to inches.

returns.doc: a value in inches if successful
